headline: Trump SLAMS Venezuela SKIES 🚫✈️🛑 Cartel Cucks 😤💨
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP 🍊🦅👑 dropping AIRSPACE NUKES 💣☁️🚫 on VENEZUELA'S SKY HIGHWAY 🛣️✈️! 'To all Airlines ✈️😩, Pilots 🧑‍✈️🎛️, Drug Dealers 🤑💊🚤, and Human Traffickers 🤮🛂 – CONSIDER THAT SHIT CLOSED 🔒🚫 ENTIRELY!' Trump tweets 🔥📱, no legal power 💪⚖️ but BIG DICK ENERGY 🍆😤 scaring airlines OFF like ghosts 👻✈️💨! FAA already WARNED ⚠️📢 of 'heightened military RUMBLE' 🤜💥 around Maduro's Maduro-land 🇻🇪😡.

US flexing HARD 💪🦅 with USS GERALD FORD 🛫🏢 – world's BIGGEST carrier daddy 🚀🍆 – and 15K troops 👮‍♂️🔫 STRIKING DISTANCE from Caracas chaos 🌪️! Biggest deploy since PANAMA INVASION '89 🪖🏴‍☠️ – all to SMASH drug boats 🚤💊 BOOM BOOM 💥🩸, 21 strikes KILLING 80+ narcos 😵🚫 but ZERO proof of coke cargo 🤷‍♂️📦? Venezuelan simp Maduro 🤡🇻🇪 calls it COUP PLOT 🗡️😠 to YEET him off throne 👑🚮 after RIGGED election 🍳🗳️ opposition ROASTED 🔥!

Enter CARTEL DE LOS SOLES ☀️🤑 – Trump's naming MADURO & crew as TERROR ORG 🚫🧨💣, unlocking LAW ENFORCEMENT ORGY 🔓👮‍♂️🔫 to DISMANTLE that sun cartel ass 🍑🔥! Diosdado Cabello 😏🇻🇪 – alleged cartel bro – screams 'FAKE NEWS INVENTION' 🤥📰 while State Dept SPILLS: 'Corrupted military 🪖😈, intel 🕵️‍♂️🤫, legislature 🏛️💰, judiciary ⚖️🤑 – VENEZUELA'S ROTTEN TO THE CORE 🥬🍆!' Foreign ministry RAGE-REJECTS 😡🚫 like salty losers 🧂😭.

Maduro BANS six big airlines ✈️🚫 – Iberia 🇪🇸, TAP Portugal 🇵🇹, Gol 🇧🇷, Latam 🌎, Avianca 🇨🇴, Turkish 🕌 – for missing 48hr flight deadline ⏰😠! Trump hints LAND DRUG WAR 'VERY SOON' 🌾🚫🤑, White House ghosting BBC 👻📺. Caribbean MIL PRESENCE building like Thanos snap 🫰💥 vs smuggling – VENEZUELA'S skies about to be DADDY TRUMP'S NO-FLY ZONE 😎🚫☁️! Cartel simps SWEATING 😰💦, airlines GHOSTING 👻✈️, Maduro's empire CRUMBLES like stale arepas 🫓💥 – USA! USA! 🦅🇺🇸🔥‼️
